/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode-26.5-beta.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=11.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -isysroot /Applications/Xcode-26.5-beta.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=11.0  -isysroot /Applications/Xcode-26.5-beta.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=11.0 CMakeFiles/makeDeps_Self.dir/build_support/makeDeps.cpp.o -o makeDeps_Self
